summary: Phase A Live Global Trade Intelligence — full backend + frontend testing PASSED. All 8 pytest cases pass and all UI flows on /customs-compliance work end-to-end. OEC World live data is flowing through correctly; Brain trade_statistics engine returns real numbers.
critical_code_review_comments: trade_intel.py: HS map first-load (status/hs-search initial call) has a 60s timeout against OEC /members — consider warming this on app startup so users don't pay the latency cost.
trade_intel.py _norm_hs uses digits[:6] — fine for BACI HS6 cube, but if user inputs HS8 (e.g. 870380xx) it silently truncates. Acceptable but document this behavior in the UI helper text.
CACHE_TTL_DAYS=14 — reasonable for annual data; consider invalidating on year rollover.
test_credentials: Not applicable — public endpoints, no auth required.
seed_data_creation: None. HS6 directory was already cached in Mongo from prior run; /api/trade-intel/status returned hsCodesIndexed=5400+ instantly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase A trade intel works end-to-end via OEC World. COMTRADE_API_KEY is intentionally unset; comtradeEnabled=false. When COMTRADE_API_KEY is added, re-run test_trade_intel.py and additionally assert sourceKey can be 'comtrade' when its year >= OEC year. The /api/trade-intel/stats endpoint serves cached results for 14 days — use ?force=true to bust cache for live verification.
verified_flows: GET /api/trade-intel/stats?hs=090111 / 270900 / 851713 → real OEC 2024 data with totalWorldTradeUSD>0, topImporters/Exporters with country/value/share, multi-year trend
POST /api/brain/ask 'top importers and world trade value for HS 090111' → enginesUsed includes trade_statistics, engineOutputs.trade_statistics present with hsCode=090111

Frontend /customs-compliance → Trade Statistics tab → search 'coffee' → suggestions dropdown → click → trade-result with source-badge (OEC World 2024), world-value ($801.4M), importers, exporters all render
Frontend direct HS '870380' entry + trade-submit → returns $139.59B world value
Frontend trade-ask-brain links to /brain?q=... with prefilled query
Regression: customs-tab-report, customs-tab-terms, customs-tab-fx all still render and switch correctly
